sharedEntities.description: Core entity representing loan information flowing from AI service to UI for display and interaction
Represents conversation context that persists between UI and AI service, storing question-answer history for loan inquiries
Content exchanged during chat sessions, sent from UI to AI service and returned as responses

dataFlows.name: Loan Query Conversation
dataFlows.description: End-to-end flow of user asking questions about loans through natural language interface
steps: User selects loan in Selling UI
UI creates a chat session via POST /selling/api/sessions
AI service initializes session context with loan data
Question sent to AI service via POST /chat/{session_id}/message
AI service processes using AWS Bedrock
Response streamed back via Server-Sent Events
UI displays response and stores in chat history

dataFlows.name: Loan History Retrieval
dataFlows.description: Flow for accessing historical loan conversations
steps: UI fetches session history via GET /selling/api/sessions/{sessionId}/history
AI service retrieves stored conversation from database
Chat history displayed to user in UI

integrationPoints.description: UI sends user questions about loans to AI service and receives detailed loan insights and explanations
AI service streams response tokens to UI for progressive rendering of AI responses

patterns.description: Uses Server-Sent Events to stream AI-generated content token by token, providing immediate feedback to users rather than waiting for complete responses
Allows users to query complex loan data using natural language rather than structured forms or SQL-like queries
Maintains conversation context across multiple interactions, allowing follow-up questions without restating context

ambiguities: The exact relationship between COS.Lending.Selling.API and cos-lending-selling-ai is unclear - whether they're separate services or if one proxies requests to the other
How loan actions from LoanAction entity in cos-lending-selling-ai are reflected in or initiated from the UI
The mechanism for synchronizing loan data between PostgreSQL (referenced in cos-lending-selling-ai) and the data source for COS.Lending.Selling.UI
